global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a grid layout showcasing game pieces and a prominent call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join a gaming arena and play with friends.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Game grid layout
elements.description: A grid layout with circular elements representing game pieces, arranged in a 2x2 formation.

elements.label: Game piece
elements.description: A circular game piece with a brown color, positioned in the top center of the grid.

elements.label: Game piece
elements.description: Another circular game piece with a brown color, positioned in the top left of the grid.

elements.label: Game piece
elements.description: A circular game piece with a brown color, positioned in the center of the grid.

elements.label: Game piece
elements.description: A circular game piece with a brown color, positioned in the bottom left of the grid.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button with the text 'Claim reward' in white, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Decorative icon
elements.description: A small circular icon with a brown color, positioned near the bottom left.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: The logo text 'StormByte' in bold, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Play with friends text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Play with friends tonight' in a smaller font, positioned below the main message.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: Text labeled 'UGC' in a small font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Join the arena headline
elements.description: Bold headline text that reads 'Join the arena' positioned prominently in the center.

elements.label: Additional headline text
elements.description: Smaller text positioned above the main headline, possibly a subtitle.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The main message text 'Join the arena Play with friends tonight' in a large font, centered in the ad.
elements.text_content: Join the arena Play with friends tonight
